name: Cliff Jackson
abstract: Clifton Luther Jackson (July 19, 1902 – May 24, 1970) was an American stride pianist.

works.t: Present Arms: You Took Advantage of Me

concerts.label: Carnegie Pop Concert: Salute to Fats Waller

about_quotes.speaker: Al Hall
about_quotes.evidence: With Eddie Condon and toured with Cliff Jackson, one of the most wonderful tours I ever had.

about_quotes.speaker: Art Hodes
about_quotes.evidence: I hired Eddie Conlon, Mezzrow, Cliff Jackson, Frankie Newton and Davy Tough at seven dollars apiece, a college date

about_quotes.speaker: Herb Morand
about_quotes.evidence: I was playing with Cliff Jackson and his crazy cats at the Capitol Palace on Lenox Avenue.

about_quotes.speaker: Jacques Butler
about_quotes.evidence: Cliff Jackson was the band leader... So I got a job up there.

about_quotes.speaker: Roy Eldridge
